name: Morning Reflections Season 2026
description: Weekly Saturday show on WGSP 1490 AM. Covers guest booking, segment planning, script writing, sponsor reads, and social media content for the season running January through December 2026.

name: CPE Continuing Education 2026
description: Track and complete 50 required CPE hours by December 31, 2026. Currently 28 hours completed. Covers conference attendance, training workshops, peer review sessions, and documentation.

name: Grace Community Health Fair 2026
description: Annual community church health fair with Deacon Charles Mosley. Coordinate vendors, volunteers, health screenings, and Rebecca's wellness presentation.

name: Grace Community Fall Festival 2026
description: October 31 trunk-or-treat and fall festival at Grace Community Church. Rebecca emcees. Plan activities, arrange volunteer schedule, draft emcee script.
